# Index — capabilities

- [Error & response model](./error-response-model.md) — `capability` — Canonical APIError type plus response writers that produce consistent success/error JSON envelopes

- [JWT authentication](./jwt-authentication.md) — `capability` — Generate/validate JWTs and a handler middleware that enforces a bearer token and exposes the authenticated user + company to the handler
- [Nullable optional type](./nullable-optional.md) — `capability` — Generic type-safe optional (Nullable[T]) used for request-scoped context fields instead of *T pointers
- [Observability (request IDs, logging, Prometheus metrics)](./observability.md) — `capability` — Request-ID correlation, structured per-request logging, and Prometheus HTTP metrics as opt-in middleware
- [Route registry & registration](./route-registry.md) — `capability` — How handlers self-register into a Registry and bind onto a chi router with shared DB, logger, and optional injected services
- [Auto-generated Swagger/OpenAPI docs](./swagger-generation.md) — `capability` — Generates an OpenAPI 2.0 spec and Swagger UI from the RouteInfo + typed handler metadata a peer already declares — no separate annotations
